title: Transfection of Diplonemids using the BTX electoporator
steps: Wash the cell pellet once with 10 ml ice cold cytomix buffer spin @ 700 x g for 10 min
Resuspend the pellet in 400 ul CytoMix
Load cuvettes (0.2 cm gap) cool on ice
Electroporate (1 pulse). BTX settings: 1600 V, 25 W, 50 mF. Resuspend cells in 5 ml fresh medium and incubate for overnight
Add 5 ml of fresh media containing the appropriate antibiotic
Load the first row of wells with 1.5 ml of transfected appropriate culture
Starting in the first column, transfer 0.5 ml of the first well into the second, pipette up and down, transfer 0.5 ml to the third well, and so on
Don't dilute wells until they are teeming with Transfectants. Start with 1:2 dilutions
creator: Binnypreet Kaur
